contentGaps.label: ingredient education
contentGaps.notes: Creators who break down ingredients in plain language are outperforming generic testimonial content.

contentGaps.label: before-and-after honesty
contentGaps.notes: Audiences are responding to realistic progress framing instead of overclaimed transformations.

contentGaps.label: routine proof
contentGaps.notes: Day-in-the-life usage proof and repeat-use context are showing stronger hold rates.
